description: visao tabular de todas as usinas

options.content: Switch to Alarm View

{{#each data}}
Portfolio Overview
Active Power
{{this.active_power_mw}}MW
Rated Power
{{this.rated_power_mw}}MW
Inverters
{{this.inverter_availability}}%
{{this.active_inverters}} / {{this.total_inverters}}
Relays
{{this.relay_availability}}%
{{this.active_relays}} / {{this.total_relays}}
Generating / Waiting
{{this.generating}} / {{this.waiting}}
Medium
{{this.medium}}
Critical
{{this.critical_total}}
No Comm
{{this.no_comm}}
{{/each}}
options.defaultContent: The query didn't return any results.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(p.active_power_kw / 1000, 2) as active_power_mw,
  ROUND(p.rated_power_kw / 1000, 1) as rated_power_mw,
  ROUND(i.inverter_availability, 1) as inverter_availability,
  ROUND(r.relay_availability, 1) as relay_availability,
  p.generating,
  p.waiting,
  p.medium,
  p.critical,
  p.acknowledged,
  (p.critical + p.acknowledged) as critical_total,
  p.no_comm,
  i.active_inverters,
  i.total_inverters,
  r.active_relays,
  r.total_relays
FROM (
  SELECT
    SUM(active_power_kw) as active_power_kw,
    SUM(rated_power_kw) as rated_power_kw,
    -- GENERATING: gerando + power > 0 + inverter = 100%
    SUM(CASE WHEN power_plant_status = 'generating' AND active_power_kw > 0 AND inverter_availability_pct = 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as generating,
    -- WAITING: gerando + power = 0 + inverter = 100%
    SUM(CASE WHEN power_plant_status = 'generating' AND active_power_kw = 0 AND inverter_availability_pct = 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as waiting,
    -- MEDIUM: gerando + inverter < 100%
    SUM(CASE WHEN power_plant_status = 'generating' AND inverter_availability_pct < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as medium,
    -- CRITICAL: critical
    SUM(CASE WHEN power_plant_status = 'critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as critical,
    -- ACKNOWLEDGED: acknowledged
    SUM(CASE WHEN power_plant_status = 'acknowledged' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as acknowledged,
    -- NO COMM: sem comunicação
    SUM(CASE WHEN power_plant_status = 'no_communication' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_comm
  FROM dbt.mart_power_plants_overview
  WHERE ('${power_plant_id}' = 'All' OR power_plant_id::text = '${power_plant_id}')
) p
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT
    SUM(active_inverters) as active_inverters,
    SUM(total_inverters) as total_inverters,
    SUM(active_inverters)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(total_inverters), 0) * 100 as inverter_availability
  FROM dbt.int_inverter_availability
  WHERE ('${power_plant_id}' = 'All' OR power_plant_id::text = '${power_plant_id}')
) i
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT
    SUM(active_relays) as active_relays,
    SUM(total_relays) as total_relays,
    SUM(active_relays)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(total_relays), 0) * 100 as relay_availability
  FROM dbt.int_relay_availability
  WHERE ('${power_plant_id}' = 'All' OR power_plant_id::text = '${power_plant_id}')
) r

options.content:
Daily Energy (MWh) LIVE
{{#each yLabels}} {{this}} {{/each}}
{{#each gridLines}}
{{/each}} {{#each data}}
{{this.energy_mwh}}
{{/each}}
{{#each data}} {{xLabel @index this.day_label}} {{/each}}
options.defaultContent: The query didn't return any results.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT                                                                                                             
    TO_CHAR(sub.dia, 'DD/MM') AS day_label,                                                                          
    ROUND(SUM(sub.max_energy) / 1000, 0) AS energy_mwh                                                               
  FROM (                                                                                                             
    SELECT                                                                                                           
      date_trunc('day', s.timestamp) as dia,                                                                         
      s.device_id,                                                                                                   
      MAX(s.daily_active_energy) as max_energy                                                                       
    FROM dbt.stg_inverter_analogic_data s                                                                            
    WHERE $__timeFilter(s.timestamp)                                                                                 
      AND s.timestamp::time >= '01:00:00'                                                                            
      AND ('${power_plant_id}' = 'All' OR s.power_plant_id::text = '${power_plant_id}')                              
    GROUP BY 1, 2                                                                                                    
  ) sub                                                                                                              
  GROUP BY sub.dia                                                                                                   
  ORDER BY sub.dia ASC

options.content:
{{#each data}} {{/each}}
Name Status Rated Power Active Power Irrad. Inverter Avail. Relay Avail. PR Last Alarm Urgency
{{this.power_plant_name}} {{statusLabel this.power_plant_status this.inverter_availability_pct}} {{this.rated_power_kw}} kW {{this.active_power_kw}} kW {{this.irradiance_wm2}} W/m² {{this.inverter_availability_pct}} % {{this.rates_availability_pct}} % {{this.pr_pct}} % {{showAlarm this.power_plant_status this.last_alarm_time}} {{showUrgency this.power_plant_status this.alarm_urgency}}
options.defaultContent: The query didn't return any results.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT                                                       
      p.id AS power_plant_id,                                  
      p.name AS power_plant_name,                              
      m.power_plant_status,                                    
      m.rated_power_kw,                                        
      m.active_power_kw,                                       
      m.daily_energy_kwh,                                      
      m.irradiance_wm2,                                        
      m.inverter_availability_pct,                             
      m.rates_availability_pct,                                
      m.pr_pct * 100 AS pr_pct,                                
                                                               
      -- Último alarme HIGH (para exibir data/hora)            
      la.last_alarm_time,                                      
                                                               
      -- Urgência baseada no tempo do alarme                   
      CASE                                                     
          WHEN m.power_plant_status = 'acknowledged' THEN 'ACK'
          WHEN m.power_plant_status = 'critical' AND           
  la.last_alarm_time IS NOT NULL THEN                          
              CASE                                             
                  WHEN la.last_alarm_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP -  
  INTERVAL '1 hour' THEN 'NEW'                                 
                  WHEN la.last_alarm_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP -  
  INTERVAL '24 hours' THEN 'RECENT'                            
                  WHEN la.last_alarm_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP -  
  INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 'ONGOING'                             
                  ELSE 'CHRONIC'                               
              END                                              
          ELSE NULL                                            
      END AS alarm_urgency                                     
                                                               
  FROM public.tb_power_plants p                                
  LEFT JOIN dbt.mart_power_plants_overview m ON                
  m.power_plant_id = p.id                                      
  LEFT JOIN (                                                  
      SELECT                                                   
          power_plant_id,                                      
          MAX(timestamp) AS last_alarm_at,                     
          TO_CHAR(MAX(timestamp), 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS          
  last_alarm_time                                              
      FROM dbt.int_events_alarms                               
      WHERE LOWER(severity) = 'high'                           
      GROUP BY power_plant_id                                  
  ) la ON p.id = la.power_plant_id                             
                                                               
  WHERE p.is_active = true                                     
    AND ('${Power_plant_filter}' = 'All' OR                    
  m.power_plant_status = '${Power_plant_filter}')              
    AND ('${power_plant_id}' = 'All' OR p.id::TEXT =           
  '${power_plant_id}')                                         
                                                               
  ORDER BY                                                     
      CASE                                                     
          WHEN m.power_plant_status = 'critical' THEN 1        
          WHEN m.power_plant_status = 'acknowledged' THEN 2    
          WHEN m.power_plant_status = 'generating' AND         
  m.inverter_availability_pct < 100 THEN 3                     
          WHEN m.power_plant_status = 'no_communication' THEN 4
          WHEN m.power_plant_status = 'generating' THEN 5      
          ELSE 6                                               
      END,                                                     
      la.last_alarm_at DESC NULLS LAST,                        
      p.name ASC

list.definition:
SELECT 'All' AS power_plant_status
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT power_plant_status
FROM dbt.mart_power_plants_overview
ORDER BY power_plant_status;
list.name: Power_plant_filter
list.query:
SELECT 'All' AS power_plant_status
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT power_plant_status
FROM dbt.mart_power_plants_overview
ORDER BY power_plant_status;

list.definition:
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT
    'All'::text AS "__text",
    'All'::text AS "__value"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    power_plant_name::text AS "__text",
    power_plant_id::text   AS "__value"
  FROM dbt.mart_power_plants_overview
) x
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN "__text" = 'All' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
  "__text";
list.name: power_plant_id
list.query:
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT
    'All'::text AS "__text",
    'All'::text AS "__value"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    power_plant_name::text AS "__text",
    power_plant_id::text   AS "__value"
  FROM dbt.mart_power_plants_overview
) x
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN "__text" = 'All' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
  "__text";
